questions.question: What is the main advantage of hierarchical clustering?
keyPoints: Allows for the identification of relationships between data points at different levels of granularity

questions.question: How does hierarchical clustering handle outliers?
keyPoints: Identifies outliers as separate clusters or merges them with other clusters

questions.question: Compare and contrast agglomerative and divisive hierarchical clustering.
keyPoints: Agglomerative clustering merges clusters based on their similarity
Divisive clustering splits clusters based on their dissimilarity
